title: Tasks file
description: Shape of dashboard/tasks-data.json (the first-run seed) and of any exported task list. A wrapper object holding a `tasks` array; `_DEMO`/`_comment` convention keys are allowed. `id`, `notionId`, `status` and `updatedAt` are filled in client-side on load, so seed records may omit them.

id.description: Local id; generated client-side on load.

area.description: One of the area codes in lifeos.config.json (cross-checked by scripts/validate-data.mjs).

status.description: Defaults to 'open' when omitted in a seed file.
